message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
}

actor Nutzer as U
participant ServiceFactory as SF
participant PruefHandler as PH
participant PersonenServiceImpl as PSI
participant Proxy as PX

== Initialisierung ==

U -> SF : 1 getPersonenService()
SF -> PH : 2 create
PH -> PSI : 3 create
PSI --> PH : 4 ziel
PH --> SF : 5 instanz
SF -> PX : 6 create
PX --> SF : 7 PersonenService
SF --> U : 8 service

== service.neu ==

U -> PX : 9 neu
PX -> PH : 10 invoke
PH -> PSI : 11 neu
PSI --> PH : 12 Person
PH --> PX : 13 Person
PX --> U : 14 Person

@enduml
